seoTitle: Currimundi vs Currumbin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Currimundi and Currumbin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Currimundi and Currumbin.
heading: Currimundi vs Currumbin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Currimundi, Queensland and Currumbin, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Currumbin has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Currimundi (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Currimundi or Currumbin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Currimundi has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Currumbin scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Currimundi scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Currumbin scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Currimundi or Currumbin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Currumbin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
